ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date the stock was first listed */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* The name of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* The location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "change" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day's close */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* The volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock for the day */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* The total volume of shares traded during the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., trader, analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the trader joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the trader */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the trader */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the trader's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the trader's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader who owns the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the trading account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., individual, corporate) */,
  "date_opened" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "leverage" REAL /* The leverage level of the account */,
  "margin_balance" REAL /* The margin balance of the account */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The risk level of the account (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the account (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_accounts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader who executed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of the trade */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the trade */,
  "fee" REAL /* The fee associated with the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* The commission charged on the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* The status of the trade (e.g., executed, pending, canceled) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the broker who executed the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., tech stocks) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the analyst joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the analyst */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the analyst */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the analyst's last login */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications the analyst holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, quarterly) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A summary of the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Any recommendations provided in the report */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* The source of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, price rise) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active or not) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* The duration for which the alert is active */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the alert is checked (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_method" TEXT /* The method by which the alert is communicated (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "module" TEXT /* The module where the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* The type of action (e.g., add, delete, update) */,
  "affected_rows" INTEGER /* The number of rows affected by the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "change" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day's close */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* The volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock for the day */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* The total volume of shares traded during the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent category, if any */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* The status of the category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category it belongs to */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent industry, if any */,
  "industry_status" TEXT /* The status of the industry (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industries_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES stock_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industries_parent_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry_id") REFERENCES stock_industries ("industry_id")
)
